description: The server charges a client-supplied total, letting a tampered request underpay for the order.
body: Failure mode: the checkout charges a price, discount, or total sent by the client, so a tampered request underpays or applies a discount it never earned. Detection signals: charges below the catalog price; discounts with no matching promotion; orders whose totals do not reconcile against catalog data. Do not trust client-sent monetary values. Safer fallback: recompute every price, discount, and tax server-side from authoritative data at checkout, reject mismatched client totals, and route pricing discrepancies to business.finance.
